scripts.test:db: cd packages/api && DRIZZLE_MIGRATIONS_DIR=./drizzle bun test src/__tests__/
scripts.test:engine:full: cd packages/engine && doppler run --project social-strategy-agent --config dev -- bun test
scripts.simulate: cd packages/engine && doppler run --project social-strategy-agent --config dev -- bun run src/simulate.ts
scripts.simulate:katana:grok:smoke: cd packages/engine && doppler run --project social-strategy-agent --config dev -- bun run src/simulate.ts --games 1 --players 4 --variant mingle --model-catalog katana:grok-4-3 --reasoning-policy low --game-timeout-sec 900 --llm-timeout-sec 120
scripts.discord:setup-house: doppler run --project social-strategy-agent --config dev -- bun scripts/setup-house-discord.ts
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint
scripts.dev:api: doppler run --project social-strategy-agent --config dev -- env PORT=${PORT:-3000} POSTGAME_MEDIA_WORKER_TOKEN=${POSTGAME_MEDIA_WORKER_TOKEN:-local-render-worker} POSTGAME_MEDIA_PUBLIC_BASE_URL=${POSTGAME_MEDIA_PUBLIC_BASE_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:3000} bun run dev:api:service
scripts.dev:web: doppler run --project social-strategy-agent --config dev -- env PORT=${PORT:-3001} API_URL=${API_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:3000} WS_URL=${WS_URL:-ws://127.0.0.1:3000} API_BACKEND_URL=${API_BACKEND_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:3000} bun run dev:web:service
scripts.dev:render-worker: doppler run --project social-strategy-agent --config dev -- env POSTGAME_MEDIA_API_URL=${POSTGAME_MEDIA_API_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:3000} POSTGAME_MEDIA_WORKER_TOKEN=${POSTGAME_MEDIA_WORKER_TOKEN:-local-render-worker} bun run dev:render-worker:service
